Task Name: SPRINT 1 — SOURCE CONNECTIVITY & CDC SETUP
Identify and document all source tables (DeviceMaster / Transactions / ErrorLogs / Maintenance / Environment)
Observations & Analysis: Map all 5 source table schemas from client ODS (Azure SQL/PostgreSQL). Document: column names / data types / primary keys / update_at columns / estimated row counts / CDC capability.

Task Name: Profile source data quality baseline (null rates / duplicate rates / volume per table)
Observations & Analysis: Run profiling queries on each source table. Measure: null% per column / duplicate% / row count / date range / update frequency. Establishes baseline for quality monitoring.

Task Name: Identify CDC columns (updated_at / created_at) and validate incremental extraction feasibility
Observations & Analysis: Verify each table has updated_at timestamp. Test: SELECT * WHERE updated_at > @watermark returns only changed rows. If no CDC column: plan full-load fallback strategy.

Task Name: Provision Azure Data Factory with Managed VNet integration
Observations & Analysis: ADF Standard v2. Managed VNet enabled. Git integration with Azure DevOps/GitHub. Managed Identity for passwordless auth. No self-hosted IR needed (Managed PEs).

Task Name: Create ADF Linked Services (Source SQL + ADLS Gen2 sink) with Managed Identity
Observations & Analysis: Source: Azure SQL Linked Service via Managed Identity (no passwords). Sink: ADLS Gen2 Linked Service via Managed Identity. Test connectivity through Managed Private Endpoints.

Task Name: Create ADF Managed Private Endpoints for source database and ADLS
Observations & Analysis: Private Endpoint to client SQL/PostgreSQL (bypasses public internet). Private Endpoint to ADLS Gen2. Approve PEs in target resource portal. Verify DNS resolution.

Task Name: Build watermark tracking table (pipeline_watermarks) in control database
Observations & Analysis: Table: pipeline_watermarks (table_name / last_watermark_value / last_row_count / last_run_status / last_run_timestamp / next_expected_run). Supports incremental CDC extraction.

Task Name: Implement high-watermark CDC extraction pattern (WHERE updated_at > @last_load)
Observations & Analysis: ADF Lookup activity reads current watermark → Copy activity extracts WHERE updated_at > @watermark → Stored Proc updates watermark on success. Handles: first-run (full load) vs incremental.

Task Name: Build ADF error handling and retry logic (connection timeout / query timeout / transient failures)
Observations & Analysis: Retry policy: 3 retries with exponential backoff (30s/60s/120s). Timeout: connection=120s / query=600s. On failure: log error → send alert → skip batch → retry next cycle.

Task Name: Configure ADF tumbling window trigger (15-minute intervals)
Observations & Analysis: Tumbling window trigger: every 15 minutes. Start time: aligned to :00/:15/:30/:45. Concurrency: 1 (no parallel runs). Retry: 2 attempts. Dependency: none (independent per table).

Task Name: Build Event Grid trigger for pipeline completion events
Observations & Analysis: Event Grid System Topic on ADF. Event type: PipelineRunStatusChanged (Succeeded/Failed). Subscriber: Azure Function → triggers downstream Silver processing. Decouples Bronze from Silver.

Task Name: Build ADF monitoring dashboard (pipeline runs / success rate / latency / data volume)
Observations & Analysis: ADF Monitor: track pipeline_duration / rows_copied / data_volume_mb / watermark_delta / error_count. Alert on: duration>10min / rows=0 / failure. Diagnostic settings → Log Analytics.

Task Name: SPRINT 2 — BRONZE LAYER (Raw Data Landing)
Design Bronze layer storage structure (container / device_type / date partitioning)
Observations & Analysis: Structure: /bronze/{table_name}/date=YYYY-MM-DD/data_{batch_id}.parquet. Tables: readers / error_logs / maintenance / environment. Append-only (immutable). Snappy compression.

Task Name: Build ADF Copy Activity for telemetry table (SQL → Bronze Parquet)
Observations & Analysis: Copy Activity: source=SQL query with CDC filter / sink=ADLS Parquet (Snappy). Mapping: auto-map all columns. Add metadata: _ingested_at / _source_file / _batch_id / _pipeline_run_id.

Task Name: Build ADF Copy Activity for error_logs table (SQL → Bronze Parquet)
Observations & Analysis: Same pattern as telemetry but different source table. CDC column: timestamp (not updated_at). Handle: timestamp as partition key. Expected volume: ~1500 events/month.

Task Name: Build ADF Copy Activity for maintenance table (SQL → Bronze Parquet)
Observations & Analysis: Maintenance/SLA records. CDC column: updated_at. Includes: resolution_time / cost / parts_replaced / sla_target. ~400 records/month. Join key: device_id.

Task Name: Build ADF Copy Activity for devices master table (SQL → Bronze Parquet)
Observations & Analysis: Device master: slowly changing dimension. Full refresh daily (not CDC — small table ~200 rows). Includes: device_id / manufacturer / firmware / install_date / station / gate_type.

Task Name: Implement parallel extraction of all 4 tables using ADF ForEach activity
Observations & Analysis: ForEach activity iterates over table_config array. Parallel execution: batch_count=4 (all tables simultaneously). Config: [{table: telemetry, cdc_col: date}, {table: error_logs, cdc_col: timestamp}, ...].

Task Name: Add Bronze metadata columns (_ingested_at / _source / _batch_id / _pipeline_run_id)
Observations & Analysis: Derived column in ADF Data Flow or post-processing. _ingested_at=utcnow(). _source=pipeline().parameters.source_table. _batch_id=GUID. _pipeline_run_id=pipeline().RunId. Audit trail.

Task Name: Build Bronze ingestion manifest (JSON log per batch with row counts and checksums)
Observations & Analysis: After each Bronze write: create manifest.json with {table / date / rows_written / file_size_bytes / checksum / watermark_before / watermark_after / duration_ms}. Stored alongside parquet.

Task Name: Implement Bronze schema evolution handling (new columns from source)
Observations & Analysis: Bronze allows schema evolution (new columns auto-added). ADF mapping: dynamic schema. Parquet schema merge on read. Alert when new columns detected. Document in schema registry.

Task Name: Configure Bronze lifecycle policy (Hot tier / retention 24 months)
Observations & Analysis: ADLS lifecycle management rule: Bronze container. Hot tier (0-90 days). Cool tier (90-365 days). Archive tier (365-730 days). Delete after 730 days. Cost optimization.

Task Name: SPRINT 3 — SILVER LAYER (Data Cleansing & Validation)
Design Silver layer schema (strictly enforced / no nulls in critical columns)
Observations & Analysis: Strict schema per table. Enforce data types. Critical columns NOT NULL: device_id / timestamp / date. Standardize: UTC timestamps / uppercase enums / trimmed strings.

Task Name: Build Silver deduplication logic (MERGE on composite key: device_id + timestamp)
Observations & Analysis: Dedup strategy: keep latest by _ingested_at for same (device_id + date) key. Databricks SQL MERGE or pandas drop_duplicates. Expected dup rate: <1%. Log duplicates removed.

Task Name: Build Silver null handling rules (reject / fill / default per column)
Observations & Analysis: Rules per column: device_id NULL → REJECT record. timestamp NULL → REJECT. duration_ms NULL → fill with median. error_code NULL → fill with 'UNKNOWN'. success_flag NULL → fill with 0.

Task Name: Build Silver type casting and UTC standardization
Observations & Analysis: Cast: date strings → datetime64. temperatures → float32. counts → int32. Standardize: all timestamps to UTC. Enum mapping: 'M'→'Male' / 'HLTH'→'Health'. Timezone conversion.

Task Name: Build Silver range validation rules (temperature / voltage / percentages / counts)
Observations & Analysis: Validation: temperature_c BETWEEN -10 AND 80. power_voltage BETWEEN 2.0 AND 6.0. memory_usage_pct BETWEEN 0 AND 100. signal_strength BETWEEN 0 AND 100. Flag out-of-range as anomaly.

Task Name: Build Silver referential integrity checks (device_id exists in devices master)
Observations & Analysis: Join telemetry.device_id against devices.device_id. Orphan records (no matching device): quarantine to silver/rejected/ folder. Alert if orphan rate > 2%.

Task Name: Build Silver rejected records pipeline (quarantine / investigate / alert)
Observations & Analysis: Rejected records → silver/rejected/date=YYYY-MM-DD/. Include: original record + rejection_reason + rejection_rule. Alert: Slack/email if rejected_count > 100/batch. Monthly review process.

Task Name: Implement Silver overwrite-by-partition write strategy
Observations & Analysis: Write mode: overwrite by partition (date). Ensures idempotent reruns. Delta Lake format with MERGE for upsert. Enable: OPTIMIZE + ZORDER BY device_id for read performance.

Task Name: Build Silver processing Databricks notebook (02_silver_layer.py)
Observations & Analysis: Master Silver notebook: read Bronze → deduplicate → cast types → validate ranges → check referential integrity → calculate quality score → write Silver (pass) or rejected (fail). 3-7 min runtime.

Task Name: SPRINT 4 — DATA QUALITY FRAMEWORK (Great Expectations / Evidently)
Design 4-dimension quality scoring framework (Completeness 40% / Validity 30% / Consistency 20% / Uniqueness 10%)
Observations & Analysis: Weighted quality score = 0.4*completeness + 0.3*validity + 0.2*consistency + 0.1*uniqueness. Per MARS: overall score must be >97% to proceed to Gold. Target: 97.8%.

Task Name: Implement Completeness checks (null rate per column / critical field presence)
Observations & Analysis: Completeness = 1 - (null_count / total_count) per critical column. Critical columns: device_id / date / signal_strength / temperature / tap_success_rate. Threshold: >98% per column.

Task Name: Implement Validity checks (range validation / enum membership / date logic)
Observations & Analysis: Validity rules: temperature BETWEEN -10 AND 80. tap_success BETWEEN 0 AND 1. error_code IN (12 valid codes). date <= today(). duration_ms > 0. Threshold: >97%.

Task Name: Implement Consistency checks (referential integrity / cross-field logic)
Observations & Analysis: Consistency rules: if success_flag=1 then error_code should be null. if maintenance_date exists then device_id must exist in devices. end_time > start_time. Threshold: >95%.

Task Name: Implement Uniqueness checks (composite key uniqueness / no duplicate records)
Observations & Analysis: Uniqueness = 1 - (duplicate_count / total_count). Key: (device_id + date) for telemetry. (device_id + timestamp) for errors. Threshold: >99%. Dedup before check.

Task Name: Build quality gate logic (weighted score >=97% required / block pipeline if fail)
Observations & Analysis: Compute: quality_score = 0.4*C + 0.3*V + 0.2*Co + 0.1*U. If score >= 0.97: PASS → continue to Gold. If score < 0.97: FAIL → block pipeline → quarantine batch → alert DE team.

Task Name: Build Great Expectations expectation suites (Bronze / Silver / Gold)
Observations & Analysis: Bronze: 9 expectations (schema exists / nulls / row count). Silver: 13 expectations (types / ranges / referential). Gold: 11 expectations (feature completeness / label distribution). Total: 33.

Task Name: Build quality report generation (CSV + JSON + HTML) and MLflow logging
Observations & Analysis: quality_report.csv: per-expectation results. quality_summary.json: overall pass/fail. Log to MLflow Drift_Detection experiment. Track quality trends over time for degradation alerts.

Task Name: Build quality monitoring dashboard (real-time quality score / trends / alerts)
Observations & Analysis: Grafana/Azure dashboard: overall quality score gauge (target >97%). Per-dimension breakdown. Trend line (last 30 days). Alert: Slack/email when score drops below 97%.

Task Name: SPRINT 5 — GOLD LAYER (Feature Engineering)
Design Gold layer feature catalog (85-120 features organized by 5 calculator groups)
Observations & Analysis: 5 feature groups per MARS: Transaction (20) / Error Pattern (25) / Maintenance (15) / Environmental (15) / Temporal (10). Feature metadata: name / type / source / window / null_handling / importance.

Task Name: Build Transaction feature calculator (20 features: daily_taps / success_rate / duration stats)
Observations & Analysis: Features: daily_taps / tap_success_rate / avg_response_time / max_response_time / transaction_count_7d / transaction_count_30d / success_rate_7d / success_rate_30d / duration_std / peak_hour_ratio.

Task Name: Build Error Pattern feature calculator (25 features: error_count / bursts / severity / rolling)
Observations & Analysis: Features: error_count / error_count_7d_mean / error_count_7d_std / unique_error_types / severity_max / critical_error_count / error_burst_count / error_count_delta / cumulative_errors / error_rate_trend.

Task Name: Build Maintenance feature calculator (15 features: days_since_service / frequency / cost)
Observations & Analysis: Features: days_since_last_failure / total_maintenance_count / corrective_count / emergency_count / avg_resolution_hours / parts_replaced_count / maintenance_cost_30d / sla_compliance_rate.

Task Name: Build Environmental feature calculator (15 features: temperature trends / power stability)
Observations & Analysis: Features: temperature_c / temperature_7d_mean / temperature_7d_std / temperature_delta / power_voltage / power_voltage_std / power_stability_score / humidity_7d_mean / temp_anomaly_flag.

Task Name: Build Temporal feature calculator (10 features: hour_of_day / day_of_week / seasonality)
Observations & Analysis: Features: is_weekend / is_peak_hour / day_of_week / month / days_since_install / age_days / is_old_device (>1000d) / season / quarter / is_holiday.

Task Name: Build rolling window calculations (7d / 14d / 30d means / std / min / max)
Observations & Analysis: Window functions: .rolling(7).mean() / .rolling(7).std() for: signal_strength / temperature / error_count / response_time. Partition by device_id. Order by date. Min_periods=1.

Task Name: Build delta features (day-over-day change for key metrics)
Observations & Analysis: Delta = current_value - previous_day_value. For: signal_strength_delta / temperature_delta / error_count_delta / response_time_delta. .diff() grouped by device_id.

Task Name: Build cumulative features (running totals for errors / reboots / maintenance)
Observations & Analysis: Cumulative: cumulative_errors = .cumsum() / cumulative_reboots = .cumsum() / cumulative_maintenance = .cumsum(). Partition by device_id. Order by date.

Task Name: Build composite health_score feature (weighted combination of 6 metrics)
Observations & Analysis: health_score = tap_success*30 + (signal/100)*20 + (1-memory/100)*15 + (1-cpu/100)*15 + (uptime/24)*10 + (1-errors.clip(0,10)/10)*10. Range: 0-100. Higher = healthier.

Task Name: Build failure label (failure_next_3d binary target from maintenance events)
Observations & Analysis: Label: failure_next_3d = 1 if device had failure event within next 3 days, else 0. Join Gold features with maintenance events. Look-ahead window: 3 days. Expected positive rate: 3-5%.

Task Name: Build Gold layer master notebook (03_gold_layer.py — all 5 calculators + label)
Observations & Analysis: Master Gold notebook: read Silver → compute all 5 calculator groups → compute composite features → generate failure label → quality check → write to Gold. 10-15 min runtime.

Task Name: SPRINT 6 — FEATURE STORE & INCREMENTAL PROCESSING
Build Feature Store with versioning and PS-specific feature tables
Observations & Analysis: Feature Store: device_telemetry_features.parquet + schema.json. SemVer versioning (v1.0.0). PS-specific views: ps1_features / ps4_features / ps5_features. Delta Lake format for time-travel.

Task Name: Build feature metadata catalog (feature_name / type / source / window / null_handling / importance)
Observations & Analysis: feature_catalog.json: each feature documented with: name / data_type / calculation_logic / source_table / aggregation / time_window / null_handling / importance_score. Feeds ML and dashboard.

Task Name: Implement feature store registration in Azure ML Feature Store / Unity Catalog
Observations & Analysis: Register feature table in Databricks Unity Catalog or Azure ML Feature Store. Enable: cross-team discovery / lineage tracking / automated feature serving. Training-serving consistency guarantee.

Task Name: Build incremental Gold processing (process only new data from Silver)
Observations & Analysis: Incremental strategy: read Gold watermark → filter Silver WHERE date > watermark → compute features for new data only → MERGE into Gold. Avoids full recomputation. Reduces 15min→2min.

Task Name: Implement watermark tracking for Gold layer (last_processed_date per device)
Observations & Analysis: Gold watermark table: (device_id / last_processed_date / feature_count / quality_score). Per-device tracking enables parallel processing and failure recovery at device level.

Task Name: Build incremental daily pipeline integration (daily_scheduled_pipeline.py data portion)
Observations & Analysis: Daily pipeline data steps: Bronze ingest (new day) → Silver clean → Quality gate → Gold features (incremental) → Feature Store update. Watermark advancement. 6 AM trigger. ~5-10 min runtime.

Task Name: SPRINT 7 — PIPELINE ORCHESTRATION & ERROR HANDLING
Build master ADF pipeline (orchestrates Bronze → Silver → Gold → Quality in sequence)
Observations & Analysis: ADF master pipeline: Execute Bronze (parallel 4 tables) → If success: Execute Silver → Quality Gate → If pass: Execute Gold → Feature Store. Each step: success/failure handling.

Task Name: Implement pipeline dependency management (Silver waits for Bronze / Gold waits for Silver+Quality)
Observations & Analysis: ADF activity dependencies: Bronze.OnSuccess → Silver. Silver.OnSuccess → QualityGate. QualityGate.OnSuccess → Gold. QualityGate.OnFailure → AlertAndSkip.

Task Name: Build pipeline alerting (Slack / email on failure / quality drop / latency spike)
Observations & Analysis: Alert channels: Slack #data-pipeline-alerts. Email: data-team@. Triggers: pipeline_failed / quality_score<97% / duration>30min / rows_ingested=0. Severity: P1(failure) / P2(quality) / P3(latency).

Task Name: Build pipeline idempotency (safe to re-run without duplicate data)
Observations & Analysis: Idempotent writes: Bronze=append with unique batch_id. Silver=overwrite by partition. Gold=MERGE on (device_id + date). Safe to re-run any stage without data corruption.

Task Name: Build pipeline recovery logic (resume from last successful step on failure)
Observations & Analysis: Checkpoint tracking: last_successful_step per pipeline_run. On failure: log step + error → On retry: skip completed steps → resume from failed step. Prevents full re-execution.

Task Name: Build dead letter queue for permanently failed records
Observations & Analysis: Records that fail after 3 retries → dead_letter/ folder. Include: original_record + error_message + retry_count + timestamp. Weekly review process. Monthly cleanup of resolved items.

Task Name: SPRINT 8 — TESTING & DOCUMENTATION
Write unit tests for Bronze ingestion (schema validation / metadata columns / partitioning)
Observations & Analysis: pytest: test_bronze_schema / test_metadata_columns_present / test_date_partitioning / test_parquet_compression / test_row_count_matches_source. Synthetic test data fixtures.

Task Name: Write unit tests for Silver cleansing (dedup / null handling / type casting / range validation)
Observations & Analysis: pytest: test_deduplication_removes_duplicates / test_null_rejection / test_null_fill_median / test_type_casting / test_range_clipping / test_referential_integrity. Edge cases.

Task Name: Write unit tests for Gold feature engineering (rolling windows / deltas / health score / labels)
Observations & Analysis: pytest: test_7d_rolling_mean / test_delta_computation / test_cumulative_sum / test_health_score_range_0_100 / test_failure_label_binary / test_feature_count_matches_catalog.

Task Name: Write integration test for end-to-end pipeline (Bronze → Silver → Quality → Gold → Feature Store)
Observations & Analysis: End-to-end test: generate 100 synthetic records → ingest Bronze → clean Silver → quality gate (expect pass) → compute Gold → verify Feature Store. Assert: row counts / quality score / feature count.

Task Name: Write pipeline regression test (inject bad data / verify quality gate rejects)
Observations & Analysis: Inject: 50% null device_ids + out-of-range temperatures + future dates. Assert: quality_score < 97% → pipeline blocked → rejected records in quarantine → alert fired.

Task Name: Document data dictionary (all Bronze / Silver / Gold columns with descriptions)
Observations & Analysis: Data dictionary: table_name / column_name / data_type / description / source / nullable / example_value / validation_rule. Covers all 3 layers. Published as docs/DATA_DICTIONARY.md.

Task Name: Document pipeline architecture (data flow diagram / latency budget / SLA)
Observations & Analysis: Architecture doc: end-to-end data flow diagram. Latency budget: Source CDC (5-15min) + Bronze (2-5min) + Silver (3-7min) + Gold (10-15min) = 20-42min total. SLA: <45min E2E.

Task Name: Document operational runbook for pipeline failure troubleshooting
Observations & Analysis: Runbook: Pipeline Failure. Trigger: ADF status=Failed. Steps: identify failed step → check error logs → diagnose (5 common causes) → fix → retry → escalate if >2hr. Per MARS Section 14.
